# SRC007 - Digital 2025: How People Discover New Brands

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Digital Discovery |
| Authors / source | DataReportal / GWI |
| Year | 2025 |
| Source type | Industry dataset/report |
| Quality | Medium-High |
| URL | [https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-sub-section-brand-discovery](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-sub-section-brand-discovery) |

## Bias / limitation

Industry report; survey methodology and commercial framing.

## Core takeaway

Brand discovery is multi-source; search and social ads matter but digital ads alone are not a panacea.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to force channel mix, not single-channel obsession.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

```markdown
### Source extraction

- Source ID: SRC007
- What it changes about our strategy:
- What it proves:
- What it does not prove:
- Ad tactic suggested:
- Landing page proof suggested:
- Measurement implication:
- Follow-up source needed:
```
